name: Pineapple Upside Down Cake IV
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Firmly packed Light Brown Sugar
16 oz (2 cups) Pinnapple slices, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut two circles of waxed paper to fit the bottom of a microwaveable 8-inch round cake pan.
2. Place margarine on one circle of waxed paper. Microwave on high for 45 seconds, or until melted and bubbly. Sprinkle brown sugar over the melted margarine and arrange seven pineapple slices on top. Add cherries to the center of the pineapple slices.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, granulated sugar, baking powder, and salt. Blend in egg, oil, pineapple juice, vanilla extract, and almond extract until smooth. Pour batter over the pineapple slices.
4. Microwave at 50% (medium) for 5 minutes. Rotate the dish once. Then microwave on high for 4 to 4 1/2 minutes, rotating the dish twice. Let stand in the pan for 5 minutes. Invert onto a serving plate. Peel off the wax paper if it comes out with the cake.
